session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci and report results

session.assistant:
All tests passed successfully. Here's the summary:
**make fast-ci: PASSED**
All checks and tests completed successfully:
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1728 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK - reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5990 passed in 13.11s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 5.42s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.73s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 50 passed - **AGENTS.md Standard Check**: PASSED (19 CLAUDE.md files checked, 0 violations)
No errors or failures to report.
